model.RecordSave

model
 

  • Uses of RecordSave in model

    Classes in model that implement interfaces with type arguments of type RecordSave
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    RecordSave
    RecordSave is basically the record that is saved by the Leaderboard, it contains the ID (which is the nickname of the current Profile, only the first 5 characters in caps) and the points accumulated through a match in Play.
    Methods in model that return types with arguments of type RecordSave
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<RecordSave>
    Game.getLeaderboardList()
     
    List<RecordSave>
    Leaderboard.getLeaderboardList()

    Description
    int
    RecordSave.compareTo(RecordSave o)
